creator: alex@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-ports->kris

Over to the ports-security officer.  
However, since I did very similar changes some months ago, these look 
fine. 

I myself lost my patches, but if you still have them, Kris, you might want to 
compare them :-) 
(and merge if I have some additional ones)
